LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT METLIFE'S MOTION TO DISMISS CLAIMANTS UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. RESPONDENT MET LIFE'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM IS DENIED. COUNSEL AGREED IN AUGUST 2016 TO AN OPEN EXTENSION OF DEADLINES FOR ARBITRATION OF THE CLAIM. (SCIACCA DEC. EX. C.) THE CONTROLLING STATUTE IS INSURANCE CODE 11580.2, AND RESPONDENT CITES NO AUTHORITY REQUIRING DISMISSAL UNDER THAT LAW. CCP 583.310 AND 583.410 REGARD TRIALS IN COURT. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600 EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Claimants Underinsured Motorist Claim
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT METLIFE's Motion To Dismiss Claimants Underinsured Motorist Claim.

Respondent Met Life's motion to dismiss the underinsured motorist claim is DENIED. Counsel agreed in August 2016 to an open extension of deadlines for arbitration of the claim. (Sciacca Dec. Ex. C.) The controlling statute is Insurance Code 11580.2, and respondent cites no authority requiring dismissal under that law. CCP 583.310 and 583.410 regard trials in court.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Claimants Underinsured Motorist Claim
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Continued To Feb-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Claimant To Sign Medical Authorizations
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David Kleczek Esq (510-663-7100) for Charlotte Mims Petitioner and opposing party
Rebecca Menendez Esq. of Powers & Miller (916-924-7900) for Metlife Respondent and moving party through court Call.

Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem hearing the matter today. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Motion To Compel Claimant To Sign Medical Authorizations is Granted. No sanctions awarded. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
